data.title: Cadence Opportunities Fund Updates on Buy-Back Program
data.description:
An announcement from Cadence Opportunities Fund Ltd. ( (AU:CDO) ) is now available.

Cadence Opportunities Fund Limited has announced an update regarding its ongoing on-market buy-back program. As of September 26, 2025, the company has repurchased a total of 459,992 ordinary fully paid securities, including 33,542 securities bought back on the previous day. This buy-back initiative is part of the company’s strategy to manage its capital structure and potentially enhance shareholder value.

data.title: Schaffer Corporation Withdraws Profit Guidance Amid JLR Cyber Incident
data.description:
An announcement from Schaffer Corporation Limited ( (AU:SFC) ) is now available.

Schaffer Corporation Limited has withdrawn its first-half financial year 2026 profit guidance for its Automotive Leather division due to a cyber incident affecting its major customer, Jaguar Land Rover (JLR). This incident has led to a production halt at JLR, impacting Schaffer’s sales volumes and short-term profitability. Despite these challenges, Schaffer has taken measures to mitigate financial impacts and maintains a strong financial position, retaining its interim dividend.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:SFC) stock is a Buy with a A$24.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Schaffer Corporation Limited stock, see the AU:SFC Stock Forecast page.

More about Schaffer Corporation Limited

Schaffer Corporation Limited operates in the automotive industry, primarily focusing on the production and supply of automotive leather. The company serves major automotive manufacturers, with a significant market focus on providing leather products for car interiors.

Average Trading Volume: 2,002

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: A$285.4M

Learn more about SFC stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: EV Resources Expands U.S. Antimony Portfolio with Milton Project Acquisition
data.description:
EV Resources Limited ( (AU:EVR) ) has issued an update.

EV Resources Limited has acquired the Milton Canyon Antimony Project in Nevada, strengthening its position in the U.S. critical minerals supply chain. This acquisition, along with the recent Dollar Antimony Project, enhances EVR’s portfolio, positioning the company to meet the urgent demand for secure antimony supply in the United States.

More about EV Resources Limited

EV Resources Limited operates in the critical minerals industry, focusing on the supply of antimony, a mineral designated as critical by the U.S. government. The company is strategically positioned with assets in Mexico and Nevada to deliver both near-term production and long-term security of critical minerals.

YTD Price Performance: 20.0%

Average Trading Volume: 14,395,114

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$29.55M

data.title: Iondrive Limited Issues New Shares to Support Innovative Metal Extraction Technology
data.description:
Southern Gold Limited ( (AU:ION) ) has shared an update.

Iondrive Limited has announced the issuance of 3,000,000 fully paid ordinary shares without disclosure to investors, in compliance with the Corporations Act 2001. This move is part of the company’s strategy to enhance its financial standing as it continues to develop and commercialize its innovative DES technology for metal extraction, which could significantly impact the battery recycling industry and beyond.

More about Southern Gold Limited

Iondrive Limited is a company focused on developing an innovative metal extraction process using Deep Eutectic Solvent technology (DES). The company’s primary market focus is on battery recycling, where its proprietary method aims to efficiently recover critical metals such as nickel, cobalt, lithium, and manganese in an environmentally friendly manner. Iondrive is also exploring opportunities to expand its technology into mineral processing and urban mining of e-waste.

YTD Price Performance: 50.0%

Average Trading Volume: 3,924,904

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$53.44M

data.title: Matex International Concludes Lawsuits, Trading Suspension Continues
data.description:
An announcement from Matex International Limited ( (SG:M15) ) is now available.

Matex International Limited, a company incorporated in Singapore, announced the discontinuance of two lawsuits, OA 733 and OA 790, following a court hearing and judgment. The court indicated that an injunction against the Subscription Agreements would have been granted if OA 733 had not been discontinued due to non-compliance with the company’s constitution. The trading suspension of the company’s securities remains in effect, and stakeholders are advised to stay informed through future announcements.

More about Matex International Limited

Average Trading Volume: 1,025,800

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: S$11.35M

data.title: Trinity One Metals Upsizes Private Placement to $750,000
data.description:
An update from Aranjin Resources ( (TSE:TOM) ) is now available.

Trinity One Metals Ltd., a company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, has announced an increase in its non-brokered private placement from $600,000 to $750,000 due to strong investor demand. The funds raised will be used for exploring new growth opportunities, maintaining the company’s exploration portfolio, and general working capital. The offering includes issuing 15,000,000 units, each consisting of one common share and one warrant, with a related party transaction involving company insiders subscribing for 4,300,000 units.

data.description:
